session_context_hint: If operator returns and signs off on #7240/#7245/#7215 (the three pending PRs), and rotates any keys consumed during the session, the cluster-paused writers (Primary, Repair, Improver) can be resumed as a batch. Branch Salvage (3-day pause) needs a separate investigation.
